items.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
items.title: Update on Progress of AB-PMJAY and ABDM
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Update on Progress of AB-PMJAY and ABDM A total of 43.52 crore Ayushman cards have been created, including 1.14 crore Ayushman Vay Vandana cards created for senior citizens aged 70 years and above 36,229 hospitals have been empanelled under AB-PMJAY across the country, out of which 19,483 are public and 16,746 are private hospitals The lates…

items.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
items.title: Steps Taken to Curb Adulteration in Food Items
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Steps Taken to Curb Adulteration in Food Items Over 5.18 Lakh Samples Analyzed in Three Years; 88,192 Penalties Imposed, 3,614 Convictions Secured FSSAI has developed Risk Based Inspection System where frequency of inspection is decided based on risk associated with Food businesses and issued guidelines FSSAI has notified 252 food testing la…

items.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
items.title: Steps taken for Prevention and Control of Vector-Borne Diseases
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Steps taken for Prevention and Control of Vector-Borne Diseases Government of India is providing free of cost JE vaccine (2 doses) under Universal Immunization Programme for children aged 9-12 months & 16-24 months For surveillance and free of cost diagnosis of Dengue and Japanese Encephalitis, a network of Sentinel Surveillance Hospitals an…

items.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
items.title: Update on National HPV Vaccination Programme
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Update on National HPV Vaccination Programme Single-dose Gardasil-4 vaccine is administered free of cost at government health facilities across all areas including rural and underserved area Government of India has implemented a multi-faceted approach that includes screening, early diagnosis and timely treatment, aiming to reduce the burden …

items.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
items.title: Update on Operationalization of PHCs and CHCs as per IPHS Norms
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Update on Operationalization of PHCs and CHCs as per IPHS Norms As on 6th March 2026, 100% of healthcare facilities have been assessed for IPHS with 63% facilities scoring more than 50% The share of Out-of-Pocket Expenditure (OOPE) in Total Health Expenditure has declined from 62.6% in 2014-15 to 39.4% in 2021-22 Posted On: 17 MAR 2026 1:15P…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to Manohar Parikar, former Defence Minister and Chief Minister of Goa on his Punyatithi
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to Manohar Parikar, former Defence Minister and Chief Minister of Goa on his Punyatithi A staunch nationalist and a humble person at heart, Parrikar Ji's life and contributions to the nation will always be remembered His legacy as a people's leader will continue to inspire gener…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extends warm greetings to the NCB personnel on their Raising Day
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extends warm greetings to the NCB personnel on their Raising Day A premier agency dedicated to shielding our youth from drugs, NCB shoulders responsibility with deftness NCB is advancing Modi Ji's vision of drug-free India at remarkable pace Nation salutes their dedication and patriotism Po…
